text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian continues to run with everything she's
got, but she realizes that she is physically
reaching her peak as an athlete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, despite the pain that comes with it, all she
can do to satisfy herself is continue running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun recognizes Narita Brian's true
intentions behind her racing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows that, just as Narita Brian once excited
her, she will excite Narita Brian with her own
running abilities.
